name: Bee Swarm Simulator
features: AutoFarm: Automatically collects pollen in selected fields and converts it to honey at your hive.
AutoDig: Continuously collects pollen from nearby flowers.
Teleportation: Instantly move to specific fields or your hive.
Anti-AFK: Prevents disconnection during long sessions.
Customizable speed: Adjust AutoFarm's movement speed for more efficiency.

name: A Hero's Destiny
features: AutoFarm World 1 & 2: Automatically completes quests by targeting NPCs.
AutoQuest: Farms specific quests based on user-chosen levels.
AutoRebirth & Super Rebirth: Automates the rebirth processes to increase stats.
AutoTrain: Continuously trains your character to gain stats.
Anti-AFK: Keeps you active to avoid being kicked.

name: Black Hawk Rescue Mission
features: AutoPilot: Automatically flies the helicopter to designated locations.
AutoRescue: Identifies and rescues stranded NPCs without manual input.
AutoLand: Safely lands the helicopter at specified zones.
Fuel Management: Monitors fuel levels and auto-refuels when necessary.
Anti-AFK: Prevents disconnection during long rescue missions.
